tools.description: Authenticated tool for inspecting recent received events, duplicates, and signature status.

tools.name: get_event_detail
tools.description: Authenticated tool for reading one event with attempts, deliveries, and optional raw payload.

tools.name: list_open_issues
tools.description: Authenticated tool for listing open anomaly and delivery issues. Use q for smart lookup by anom_, dst_, evt_, or src_ IDs, or plain text like a status code or error message.

tools.description: Authenticated tool for listing fanout delivery attempts with filters.

tools.name: list_retry_jobs
tools.description: Authenticated tool to list retry jobs.

tools.name: resolve_anomalies
tools.description: Authenticated tool for marking one or more open anomalies resolved by anomaly_id.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "rotate_endpoint_secret" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Authenticated tool for rotating the signing secret for one endpoint.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_messages, get_message, list_message_attempts, list_open_issues, get_metrics_summary, get_slack_connect_url · Private data: list_api_keys, create_api_key, revoke_api_key, rotate_source_token, archive_source, rotate_endpoint_secret · Public sink: describe_relin, list_supported_webhook_shapes, get_setup_guide, send_message, ensure_webhook_setup · Destructive: delete_endpoint, delete_event_type.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_messages, get_message, list_message_attempts, list_open_issues, get_metrics_summary, get_slack_connect_url · Private data: list_api_keys, create_api_key, revoke_api_key, rotate_source_token, archive_source, rotate_endpoint_secret · Public sink: describe_relin, list_supported_webhook_shapes, get_setup_guide, send_message, ensure_webhook_setup · Destructive: delete_endpoint, delete_event_type

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
